channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: In 1812, a powerful earthquake made the Mississippi River flow backwards and created a lake that still exists today
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Netanyahu was not warned in advance': Israeli PM blindsided as Donald Trump scrapped Iran strike plans
item.description: US President Donald Trump surprised Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu by cancelling planned strikes against Iran and announcing a potential diplomatic deal within days. Trump claimed Iran's leadership approved a draft framework, aiming to extend a ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Netanyahu, reportedly caught off guard, had urged continued military pressure, highlighting growing differences over Iran policy.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Japan's struggling flagship H3 rocket returns to flight with the debut of a low-cost variant
item.description: Japan's H3 rocket achieved a crucial success Friday, launching a new low-cost variant from Tanegashima Space Center. This marks a vital comeback after previous mission failures, bolstering Japan's competitive edge in the global space industry.

item.title: Has Donald Trump ruled out a strike on Iran's Kharg Island?
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: South Korea court sentences ex-President Yoon to 30 years in jail over 2024 drone case
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies at 47 after over three years in coma; royal succession in focus
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: “Free him”: Twitch streamer BruceDropEmOff backs Karmelo Anthony and sparks fierce debate over Austin Metcalf murder conviction
item.description: Streamer and YouTuber BruceDropEmOff publicly supported Karmelo Anthony after the teenager was convicted of murdering Austin Metcalf and sentenced to 35 years in prison. Bruce’s “#FREEHIM” message sparked debate online. Supporters viewed it as standing with Anthony, while critics argued it ignored the jury’s decision. The case continues to fuel discussions about race, justice, accountability, and self-defense.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Who is Bricks & Minifigs CEO? Ammon McNeff faces tough Coffeezilla questions over missing LEGO Star Wars collection
item.description: Coffeezilla’s latest investigation into the Bricks & Minifigs controversy included a direct conversation with CEO Ammon McNeff about a missing LEGO Star Wars collection linked to the Salem, Oregon, store. McNeff said corporate did not know about a spreadsheet tracking the collection. Coffeezilla also revealed documents estimating the collection’s value at roughly $107,000 instead of $200,000.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: "If the surgery goes wrong....": Clavicular’s extreme $35,000 jaw surgery plan sparks explosive internet debate over beauty obsession
item.description: Streamer Clavicular sparked major online debate after revealing plans for a $35,000 bimaxillary osteotomy, also known as jaw surgery. In a viral interview, he described the painful recovery, cosmetic goals and criticism surrounding the procedure. Social media users were divided, with some praising his honesty while others criticized growing beauty pressures online. The controversy also reignited conversations about appearance culture, influencer fame and the extreme lengths people take for transformation.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: Lewis Hamilton’s bold new Barcelona paddock look steals attention while Kim Kardashian exits Europe
item.description: Lewis Hamilton drew attention ahead of the Spanish Grand Prix by debuting a new hairstyle in Barcelona. The Ferrari star appeared relaxed and confident after a strong Monaco weekend. His appearance also came shortly after he publicly thanked Kim Kardashian for her support, while reports continue to suggest the couple’s relationship is becoming increasingly serious.
item.dc:creator: Global Sports Desk

item.title: Johnny Somali cites bipolar disorder in bid to reduce prison sentence in South Korea
item.description: Controversial streamer Johnny Somali is appealing his six-month sentence in South Korea, citing inability to access bipolar medication. While his lawyer argues for leniency, acknowledging some offenses and victim wishes, prosecutors are pushing for a severe three-year term, citing financial motives and lack of compensation. A decision is due soon.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Canadian traveller faces $147,000 medical bill after insurance claim is denied: 'I don’t remember anything'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: US diplomat found dead in Myanmar hotel, Thai woman detained: 'Out of respect...'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: YouTuber Ben Phillips reports gunpoint robbery as French police arrest five suspects
item.description: YouTuber Ben Phillips narrowly escaped a terrifying ordeal in Cannes, France, when armed robbers stormed his luxury villa. The intruders, who allegedly demanded money and a safe, stole valuables worth approximately £1.4 million. Phillips recounted how a gun jammed when pointed at him, allowing his escape. French authorities have since arrested five suspects in connection with the brazen heist.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: DOJ charges three with smuggling migrant kids to US: 'This was a business'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Iowa Guv issues statement amid job fear: 'At no point during our negotiations was it even considered to employ H-1B visa holders'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Political philosopher quote of the day: 'Since love and fear can hardly exist together...' — Niccolò Machiavelli
item.description: Machiavelli's renowned adage about being 'feared rather than loved,' from his 16th-century work The Prince, endures as a pivotal notion in today’s political dialogue. He posited that while fear can maintain order, it must be balanced with caution to avoid transformation into hatred.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: IShowSpeed’s Champions song takes another step toward FIFA World Cup 2026 spotlight with Achraf Hakimi’s TikTok
item.description: Achraf Hakimi recently used IShowSpeed’s 2026 World Cup song “Champions” in a TikTok post, according to screenshots shared by IShowSpeedHQ. The update also highlighted a previous photo of Hakimi and Speed together at a stadium. The interaction has increased visibility for the song and added to growing interest surrounding the 2026 FIFA World Cup and its culture.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Trump is 'frustrated with everyone' in the White House, says MAGA source: 'Knives are out'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Indian-origin Vijay Kumar pleads not guilty to murders of wife and 3 relatives: 'It's a tragic case of self defense'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk
